scenario.name: UAC Inbound (softphone -> ACD/IVR)
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: 100rel,timer Session-Expires: 1800 Min-SE: 90 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,OPTIONS,INFO,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

PRACK sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 PRACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE Content-Length: 0
